title: 宝塚記念の後に・メジロの強さ

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I let first place slip away. But...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Good job, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: That's McQueen for ya! She's done it again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I lost again, huh... Guess I was always just—

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: You're a real fighter, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... You stuck it out to the very end! You were so awesome, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text:
You Mejiros are really somethin' else! Way to go,
you two!

text_block_list.name: Spectator F
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the incredible race, you two! I'll never,
ever forget it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Everyone...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Th-they're talking about me too?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
They are, Ryan! You exhibited your power to the
very end!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
They've all been enchanted by your display of
strength! By how you never surrendered, never
turned from the challenge ahead!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: My... strength?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I-it's... it's like they know me better than I know
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Which must mean... I really am strong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah! You're right! Thanks so much for cheering
me on, folks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro McQueen fails to come in first at
the Takarazuka Kinen, she emerges the victor in
the Mejiro family competition.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, although the Takarazuka Kinen has come to
a close...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Competing with Ryan has allowed me to see my
next goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My next objective shall be the autumn Tenno
Sho, following my win in the spring—the Twin
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It is a feat yet to be achieved by anyone in the
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now that Grandmother has entrusted me with the
task...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I want to show her, and everyone else in my
family, a new path forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, without fail!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A fire burns in Mejiro McQueen's eyes as she sets
her sights on this new goal—successive wins in the
Twin Tenno Sho.
